titleStmt.title: SII 31.45: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 45. (A.R. No. B 229 of 1936.) NĪLAGAṄGAVARAM, VINUKONDA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: A slab set up in Survey No. 30 about two miles to the north west of the village.
This inscription is dated in the Śaka year 1212 and also expressed in Chronogram, (Bhānō-ārkka) Vikṟiti, Bhādrapada ba. 15. Tuesday, solar eclipse corresponding to September 5, 1290 A.D.

The Sanskrit portion of the inscription records the gift of Mollakallūru village alias Śivapura to the temple of Mahēśvara by king Aṁbadēva (II) and in the Telugu portion of text that the gift is stated to have been given to Mallināthayaṅgāru of Reṁḍrēvu, residing at Tripurantaka-kshētra probably to manage the temple. The record was composed by Nammana-nandana (son of Nammana).
The inscription refers to the construction of flights of steps at the eastern gate of the temple by Kumāra-kshitibhṛit i.e. Kumāra-Pratāparudra.
(Pub: Epigraphia Indica, Vol. XXV. pp. 270 ff.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vārāhaṁ vapuravyādvō mahīmu
harēḥ yasyadaṁṣṭrāgra viśrāmahī
tējasya munimṛṣṭa
jiyā

katama
tāṁ śuranārataṁ .
yadhāmā¨rga prava¨rtaku vidhivvī¨ryaika nilayaṁ
kṣātraṁ va¨rṇnamajījanat . bhā¨rgga vādbhagna hṛdayē
kṣātra lōkēpya vikriyāḥ . śā¨ryya pāraparaṁgatā statra
kāyasdhāḥ kaṭīvikrutāḥ . tatrānvayē saṁjā
taḥ śrīmān gāṁgaya sāhīṇiḥ . payōdhā vivapa
¨ryyapta tējaḥ Amṛta dīdhitiḥ . sura śākhina Iva
surabhiḥ kamalēvāmṛtakasya kalyāṇī . sa¨rvva
janīnā sahajā caṁdaladēvī babhūvāsya . Aṁba
kṣmāpādasūtēyaṁ caṁdalāṁbā sutadvayaṁ .
vāsudēvādivāśāsyaṁ dēvakīdaivatairapi . pratya¨rddhi
pṛdhvīpatē māḷiratna prabhāpiśaṁgīkṛta pādapiṭha
ḥ . janā¨rddanaḥ kṣmādhīpati¨rjanāṁ jā(yā)yānabhū
t jaṁgamapā pārijātaḥ . bāhābalakṣu¨rṇa(¨rṇṇa)
vipakṣa lōkastasyāmajaḥ śrītripurāridēvaḥ .
sauṁda¨ryya saṁdarśita manmadhaśrī¨rvvidyā
vilāsāspada māviraśita Āyuṣmānaṁbadē
va kṣitīpatiranuja tasya pṛdhvīṁpraśāsti prācīna
kṣōṇīpāla praṇahita samaraprauḍhi pārīṇabāhaḥ .
prahya patya¨rddhi pṛdhvīparibhṛ(vi)ḍa makuṭasyūta mā
ṇikyani¨ryya jjajvūlā jūlāvalīḍa svusnuṭa pada kamaladyaṁdya
saṁda¨rśanīyaḥ . Ayaṁ mahā bābūranīka raṁ
gē mānyaśriyō māḷava dhūmakētōḥ . gu¨rvvī
ṁ guriṁdāla gaṇādhipasya sāṁbra mrājyalakṣmīṁ
sahasrā ja hāra

śākē bhāṁmnva (bhānvā)¨rkka śaṁ(saṁ)khkāvilasati vikṛtē vatsarē
bhādramāsē da¨rśē bhaumasyavārē . sukridini (sukṛtini) sukṛti
samayē dvādaśā¨rddhōparāgē . prādādaṁba kṣi
tīṁdraḥ prati(dhi)ta śivapuraṁ mōlla kallūri nāmagrāma
ṁ mahēśvarāya . prakaṭita ma

maṁ dha¨rmma
pālanīyyō (nīyō) cha
dchissa¨rvā nētān bhāviṇaḥ pā¨rtrivēṁdrā bhūyō
bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . bahubhi
¨rvva sudhāttā rājabhisadā(ga)rādhibhiḥ . yasya
yasya yadā bhūmiḥ (mista)tasyatadhā(dā) phala .
m(ṁ) . śutrūṇaṁpi (ṇāpi) tḷatō (kṛtā) dha¨rmmaḥ pālanīyyō(nīyō) praya
tnataḥ . śutrūrēvahiśatruḥ syādha¨rmmaḥ śatru
¨rṇna kasyacit . māṣamēkaṁ suva¨rṇnasya bhūmē
rapya¨rddha maṁgaḷam (maṁgaḷam) harannaraka māpnōtiyā
vadā bhūta saṁplavaṁ . yadhācaṁdrama
sōvṛ¨rddhi hiṇyahanijāyatē . tadhā bhū
mi kṛtaṁ dānaṁ sasyē sasyē viva¨rddhatē . Āyuṣma
tā nammanandanēna pratyagravāṇī hśadaya
ṁgamēna . samyakṛtaṁ śāsanava¨ryya mē
tatyarvēpi sṛṇvaṁtu sahādarēṇa . svastiśrī
śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1212 Agunēṇṭa vikri(kṛ)ti
saṁvatsara bhādrapada bahuḷa 15 maṁga
ḷavārana sū¨ryyagrahaṇa kālamuna
ṁdu svastiśrīmatugaṇḍaveṇdāra Aṁbadē
va mahārājulu śrī triparāṁtakaṁ kṣē
travāsulaina reṁḍrēvulu mallinādhayaṁ
gāriki mollalakallūru sa¨rvva bādā(dhā) pari
hāramu Ācaṁdrā¨rkasdhāyi gānu Iccina vi
vapuramu . maṁgaḷamahā śrīśrīśrī .
dēvīyasya tvakīyyaṁ(svakīyaṁ) tripuravijayanē
cakṣuratpātya (cakṣurutpātya) pūjāṁ śritvārējē tatōpidda
taramalaṁ dōcāyākhyaṁ prasiddhaṁ
pū¨rvvadvārē kumārakṣiti bhṛyaparitasta pu
rārēḥ purastādramyaṁ sōpāna mārgaṁvuma
karamamalaṁ dyuḥ pratijñaṁ vidhāya .
Digital edition of SII 31.45 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
